column1: Boris (to run) to the bathroom two minutes ago.
He just (to have) time to take a cold shower last evening.
He (to be) in a hurry to catch the 8 am train last morning.
Yesterday he (to meet) three other boys from his group.
They (to get off) the train ten minutes ago.
They (to find) themselves on the shore of a large lake an hour ago.
The boys (to spend) a lot of time there last month.
You (to come) home at six o’clock yesterday.
I (to drink) two cups of tea last morning.
Last week she (to write) a funny story about her pet.
You (to tell) your mother the truth about the money yesterday.
